name: IRC_MSG_DESIGNS_VL
query: SELECT B.MESSAGE_DESIGN_ID, B.MESSAGE_DESIGN_CODE, B.DESIGN_TYPE_CODE, B.DESIGN_STATUS_CODE, B.DESIGN_EDITOR_TYPE_CODE, TL.DESIGN_NAME, TL.TEMPLATE_DESCRIPTION, B.MODULE_ID, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.SEED_DATA_SOURCE FROM IRC_MSG_DESIGNS_B B, IRC_MSG_DESIGNS_TL TL WHERE B.MESSAGE_DESIGN_ID = TL.MESSAGE_DESIGN_ID AND TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
